meta.title: Air Force Fighter Pilots | Ep. 4 : Air Force Fighter Pilot Requirements
meta.description:
Considering a career in the Air Force as a fighter pilot? Justin "Hasard" Lee, U.S. Air Force Fighter Pilot, joins us in this series on all things Fighter Pilots.

In this episode, Hasard goes over all of the requirements it takes to become a U.S. Air Force Fighter Pilot, as well as some additional tips to help you become one. 

What❓ do you have for Lee, let us know in the comments below.💬

"Hasard" Lee's Youtube:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRqj... 

G-Forces and Fighter Pilots: What’s it like to pull 9Gs?
Read About it here 👉  https://bit.ly/3iwjOrE

How playing sports can make you a better fighter pilot
Learn more here 👉   https://bit.ly/3fYag7P
